name: jeyjo-platform
description: Jeyjo Digital Platform — monorepo (storefront + Payload CMS)

scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @jeyjo/database-types typecheck && pnpm --filter @jeyjo/erp-ports typecheck && pnpm --filter @jeyjo/stock-ports typecheck && pnpm --filter @jeyjo/pricing typecheck && pnpm --filter @jeyjo/storefront typecheck && pnpm --filter @jeyjo/cms typecheck
